_note: Agent-ergonomics cases: representative findTool / describeTool / callTool inputs exercised on BOTH the CLI (--format json) and the in-process MCP adapter. The harness applies structural §4.5/§9/§13 checks to the broker response (every result is an explicit decision with a grounded, actionable next step; every error carries a type and a retry disposition; responses stay within budget) and asserts CLI↔MCP parity (same decision, toolRef, and error type). `expectDecision`/`expectErrorType` are optional anchors documenting intent; the conformance checks run regardless. See evals/METHODOLOGY.md#agent-ergonomics-and-parity.

cases.name: find-broadcast-to-team
cases.query: let the whole team know the release shipped
cases.rationale: A clear capability query should yield a confident decision with a describeTool next action.

cases.name: find-search-wiki
cases.query: look up the deployment runbook in our wiki
cases.rationale: Wiki lookup should select the Confluence search tool and instruct the agent to describe it next.

cases.name: find-absent-capability
cases.rationale: No translation tool exists; the refusal must still carry a grounded, actionable instruction (refine / index / doctor), not a bare restatement.

cases.name: find-schedule-meeting
cases.query: book a 30 minute sync with the team tomorrow
cases.rationale: Scheduling intent should resolve to the calendar create-event tool with a concrete next step.

cases.name: describe-known-tool
cases.rationale: describeTool on a cataloged ref returns its schema; CLI and MCP must agree on the toolRef.

cases.name: describe-unknown-tool
cases.rationale: An unknown ref must produce a structured TOOL_NOT_FOUND with a retry disposition, identically on both surfaces.

cases.name: call-valid-post
cases.rationale: A valid brokered call should succeed and summarize on both surfaces.

cases.name: call-unknown-server
cases.rationale: Calling a server absent from config must produce a structured CONFIG_ERROR with a next action, identically on CLI and MCP.

cases.name: call-malformed-ref
cases.rationale: A toolRef without the server.name separator must fail with TOOL_NOT_FOUND directing the agent back to findTool.
